readings.summary: Peter addresses the people on the day of Pentecost.

readings.citation:
Ps 16:1-2, 5, 7-8, 9-10, 11. R. v. 11a
Lord, you will show us the path of life.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 16:1-2, 5, 7-8, 9-10, 11. R. v. 11a
Lord, you will show us the path of life.

readings.summary: We are delivered through the blood of the lamb.

Lord Jesus, open the Scriptures to us;
make our hearts burn while you speak to us.
Jesus greets disciples on the road to Emmaus.

antiphons.text:
The disciples recognized the Lord Jesus
in the breaking of the bread, alleluia.

make our hearts burn while you speak to us.
